title: Decision: graceful shutdown correctly handles SIGTERM and SIGINT
description: The shutdown_signal() function in src/server.rs uses tokio::select! to wait for either Ctrl+C or SIGTERM (Unix only), with a pending future as the SIGTERM fallback on non-Unix. This is correct for containerized deployment. No issues found.
close_reason: All pass 4 fixes applied: media SSRF+size guard, mime/format consistency, proper keyId parsing, fail-closed sig verify, path reconstruction, key owner validation, media cap, blocking stdin fix, conflicts_with
